name: BB:CategoryDefinition: File Decode by a Utility
notes: This Building Block detects when a utility is used to decode files.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: File Decode by a Utility on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of certutil.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES 'certutil\s+(\/|\-)decode\s.*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: File Decode by a Utility on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of certutil.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES 'certutil\s+(\/|\-)decode\s.*' AQL filter query
